Participants must have a current AIS membership. To register contact the AIS Hotline at 416-395-6128 or aiscw@toronto.ca. Please Note: External support persons attending with you shall enter water as required and can attend at no charge.

Work towards a continuous swim of five metres.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 1 or Preschool Swim  3.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 3
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop staying afloat in deep water, side glide and kicking. Learn front crawl, diving and back swim. Work towards a continuous swim of 10 meters. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 2 or Preschool Swim 4.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 3
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop staying afloat in deep water, side glide and kicking. Learn front crawl, diving and back swim. Work towards a continuous swim of 10 meters. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 2 or Preschool Swim 4.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 4
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front crawl and treading water. Learn side breathing, somersault, whip-kick and forward roll. Work towards a continuous swim of 25 metres. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 3.

programs.name: Workshop: Young Inventors
programs.description: Get ready to think, design, and build like a real inventor! In this hands-on workshop, participants will use a safe, kid-friendly vibrating saw to cut and shape cardboard into amazing creations. From imaginative sculptures to inventive gadgets, kids will learn how to plan, prototype, and bring their ideas to life.

programs.name: Zumba®
programs.description: Latin dance and music inspire this fun and energetic cardio workout. Using high and low-impact steps and aerobic movements, you will dance your way to new fitness heights.

programs.name: Adult Swim 1
programs.description: Build confidence in the water one stroke at a time. Learn front and back swim, front, side and back glides, going underwater, breathing effectively and staying afloat in deep water. Work towards a continuous swim of 25 to 50 metres.

programs.description: Swim at your own pace. Discover water movements through sensory cues such as look, listen and feel and practice fun ways to enter and exit the pool to gain comfort in the water. Participants must have a current AIS membership. To register contact the AIS Hotline at 416-395-6128 or aiscw@toronto.ca. Please Note: External support persons attending with you shall enter water as required and can attend at no charge.
